## Summary

Describe the problem, MoonBit ecosystem value, and implementation boundary.

## Verification

- [ ] `python scripts/check_contributor_identity.py`
- [ ] `moon info`
- [ ] `moon fmt --check`
- [ ] `moon check --warn-list +73`
- [ ] `moon test`
- [ ] `moon run cmd/main`
- [ ] Public API and README/Changelog are synchronized.
- [ ] Referenced code and licenses are documented.

## Competition identity

- [ ] Author and committer are `python123 <python123@users.noreply.gitlink.org.cn>`.
- [ ] GitLink and GitHub will receive the same reviewed commit.
